# Liatrio Daily Lead Research — 2026-03-17\n\nPaste everything below into Claude and ask it to research contacts.\n\n---\n\nI work at Liatrio, an enterprise AI and DevOps transformation consultancy. We help large enterprises with: Enterprise AI enablement, DevOps transformation, platform engineering, application modernization (cloud-native), cloud migration, security & compliance (DevSecOps), and workforce enablement/coaching.\n\nBelow are today's top 10 target companies based on trigger events that signal they may need Liatrio's services. For EACH company, please:\n\n1. Search LinkedIn and Google for 5-10 contacts at the company who would be the right decision-makers or influencers for Liatrio's offerings (CIO, CTO, VP of Engineering, Director of Platform Engineering, Director of DevOps, Head of Cloud, Enterprise Architect, etc.)\n2. For each contact, provide: Name, Title, LinkedIn URL\n3. Write a short personalized outreach message referencing the trigger event\n\n---\n\n## #1: 3M (Signal Score: 18.5)\n\n**Liatrio Service Fit:** DevOps & Platform Engineering\n**Suggested Angle:** Liatrio builds internal developer platforms that accelerate delivery. Offer a DevOps maturity assessment.\n\n**Trigger Events:**\n- [DevOps & Platform Engineering] ‘SecDevOps’ and RPA Drive IT Modernization Efforts at DHS - GovCIO Media & Research\n  Source: GovCIO Media & Research | https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMihwFBVV95cUxPOTg4LWtFWTA0LWlsYkFjVldCa01XaXlUSkwwTGFyeWtOOXFhYjhSZkpmdkdOSUpFY1BVclEycHZxTlRsSVRKT2E5VVY5cHh3Y215UUFOMWlvOGJZeThFRUVDSFR4d1lwM3AxNi1CR3BJU3UtRUJkSERTbVFyX1hQRHpTVTZyZTA?oc=5\n- [Enterprise AI] 3M’s AI Strategy: Analysis of Dominance in Material Science, Industrial AI - PR Newswire\n  Source: PR Newswire | https://news.google.?oc=5\n\n---\n\n## #10: Rockwell Automation (Signal Score: 7.0)\n\n**Liatrio Service Fit:** Enterprise AI\n**Suggested Angle:** Liatrio helps enterprises move from AI pilots to production-scale AI. Offer an AI Strategy Session.\n\n**Trigger Events:**\n- [Enterprise AI] ROCKWELL AUTOMATION TO ADVANCE INDUSTRIAL INTELLIGENCE THROUGH EDGE-BASED GENERATIVE AI WITH NVIDIA NEMOTRON - PR Newswire\n  Source: PR Newswire | https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi_?oc=5\n- [Application Modernization] Rockwell Automation targets LatAm SMEs with cloud-native manufacturing platform - BNamericas\n  Source: BNamericas | https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiugFBVV95cUxQWDJwRm5SV3RfSXo5ZWtwelJub2tMeG42NUdKV2p4Q2xxQlVPV2hyZUFjWURlcnVwYTEyQ2I0RDdKdWR6RjJJNTFVRzhMUVowclM3LWJOcXBzUEhKLUtKVEZaUmhwMldTZEVNTmZucEpJRTVIbmpjcmxqQjg1dXJpbEN1TlhVOEtULXFLdjhMM25mejN0enljVU0tTEE0U2JqYzdjUTZMM1hXVm9YYTBsbkZ1OWR5V29hemc?oc=5\n- [Digital Transformation] Rockwell Automation (ROK) Collaborates with Laboratorios Farmacéuticos Rovi for Digital Transformation - Insider Monkey\n  Source: Insider Monkey | https://news.google.?oc=5\n- [Security & Compliance] WEBINAR: Modernizing Control Software - SDLC to DevSecOps for A&D - Aviation Week\n  Source: Aviation Week | https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinAFBVV95cUxOVFFlRlV6TllXbUlYS0YtZHRvaklsdlRTQmcyMVhjU2F0VTR0bWRJUkROeUQ0c3lmclNpM1BkbmFWRW9FQVBBMmc3YTBEczhCR0hPd0o4VmpGQkYxQUxKT2prWFZ0b2QzVm1zRmtfQWY0QzlTNkoxeTc1Q0R6NVhVTkREVFNLX0Y3R1gxVUlQRml3WW8xMHk0blduNWQ?oc=5\n- [Application Modernization] Rockwell Automation goes cloud-native on Azure to bring modern software development paradigms to the factory floor - Microsoft\n  Source: Microsoft | https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuAFBVV95cUxNenRQR1RCcVZmOGJRN0RicXR4dEJnb0JoZGxDd1drQXlxbVlXZVlDRURBbU9CUjBSQ1lTSTExaEpJQ1hHbEVCVFd5cVRjVjAwbmtuWXBvYmFUcjN6UHMwOU9iRDh5Q255SUpnWkx0SlBlQ1poUmo2ZXlvMkdBa1pOVm5kSzhHU3k4aGw0UlJhZEdWSmNSRjBhTm5Ic2lCVFRVVDVLcEhYVi1mdlh1TGJIUTRIN0ZfSllG?oc=5\n\n---\n\n
